title: Brickyard retro one-page menu: food-photo grade + logo vectorize + InDesign data-merge to print PDF/JPEG
one_line_ask: Grade four raw burger photos, vectorize the Brickyard wordmark, source a chalkboard texture, and run the client's authored InDesign menu template through a data-merge to produce a print-ready PDF and high-res JPEG.

issues: Slight warm color cast on bun (within acceptable brief parameters for designer correction)
Background kitchen worker is identifiable as a human figure though face not visible — may require blur in final deliverable
Toothpick/skewer slightly off-center but within acceptable composition tolerance
Minor lens vignetting at bottom corners — acceptable as source asset

Checkerboard pattern visible in background suggests transparency was not fully rendered as solid transparent — background shows as checkerboard rather than true alpha (acceptable as source PNG artifact, designer must verify alpha channel integrity)
Slight luminance glow/halo around letterforms against the checkerboard background (within acceptable source file tolerance)
Distress texture is subtle but present and appropriate for brief
Slight condensation on upper bottle neck creates minor distraction but adds realism
Background bar shelves are appropriately blurred but could be marginally less busy
Warm ambient light creates very slight muddy tone on label — acceptable per brief
Slight warm cast rather than cool cast specified in brief — minor deviation
Red tray visible but basket is black oval rather than explicitly red diner basket — minor
Glass of water at edge adds clutter consistent with brief but slightly cuts frame
No visible salt flake macro detail — seasoning reads as fine powder/dust rather than distinct salt crystals
Tilt is minimal/near-zero rather than the slight tilt called for in brief
Horizon tilt is minimal/barely perceptible — brief calls for ~4 degrees, actual tilt appears closer to 1-2 degrees, leaving less grading work than intended
Lighting is slightly more even and clean than the 'flat dull' documentary look specified — could use more shadow falloff and grease sheen emphasis
Cool/blue white balance cast is very subtle, almost neutral — brief implies a more noticeable cool shift for the grading chain to correct

Background condiment bottles (red ketchup squeeze bottle, white squeeze bottle) are adequately blurred but composition is tighter than a 'cluttered diner table' feel — napkin dispenser and menu card visible but scene feels moderately tidy
Cheese drip and sesame bun texture are well-rendered and photorealistic — no CGI artifacts detected
No severe AI artifacts (no melted forms, ghosting, or duplicated elements)
Subject is sharp, centered, and clearly the focal point — meets brief requirements
No real-world brand logos or trademarks visible

assets.name: menu_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
